---
name: Docs-only task
about: Request documentation updates without code behavior changes
title: "docs: "
labels: ["docs"]
assignees: []
---

## What needs to be documented?
Describe the missing or outdated documentation.

## Why is this needed?
Explain how this helps users or the team.

## Scope
- [ ] Docs/content only
- [ ] No app behavior changes
- [ ] No backend/database changes

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The target document(s) are updated
- [ ] Wording is clear for non-developers
- [ ] Links and references are valid

## Additional context
Add screenshots or links if helpful.
